global.footerText: Manufacturer and Exporter of Construction Equipment including various types of Concrete Batching Plant with options of Pan Twin Shaft & Planetary PAN Mixer, Wet Mix Macadam Plant, Precast Moulds, Cement / Storage Silos and Concrete Stationary Concrete Pump.

home.heroDescription: We engineer and manufacture industry-standard vertical cement silos, concrete batching plants, continuous wet mix macadam road base plants, planetary/twin-shaft mixers, custom precast steel moulds, and stationary concrete pumps.

about.title: Who We Are
about.subtitle: Rockmix Infra Equipments Pvt. Ltd.
about.description1: At Rockmix Infra Equipments Pvt. Ltd., we specialize in designing and manufacturing a diverse range of high-performance equipment tailored to meet the unique requirements of the construction and infrastructure industries. With a strong focus on innovation, reliability, and customer satisfaction, our products are engineered to deliver efficiency and durability across a wide spectrum of applications.

support.title: Technical Support & Service Desk
support.description: We stand by our construction equipment with real-time technical guidance, on-site commissioning, electrical layouts, and parts support.

pillars.title: Technical Assistance
pillars.desc: Our engineering experts provide detailed consults to analyze aggregate specifications, output demands, and site parameters, ensuring you acquire the precise machinery configurations.

pillars.title: On-Site Support
pillars.desc: We stand beside you with experienced engineers. From complete concrete foundation blueprints, electrical line diagrams, mechanical erection, wet-mix calibration, and operator training.

pillars.title: Financial Flexibility
pillars.desc: We recognize project cash-flow cycles. Our pricing is highly competitive, and we offer modular scaling choices where auxiliary feeders or silos can be added later as project scope climbs.

pillars.title: Long-Term Partnership
pillars.desc: Commitment that goes miles beyond delivery. We guarantee immediate dispatch of critical wearing spares (anti-wear liners, mixing paddles, valves) and lifetime access to software updates for PLC panels.

dealership.title: Dealership & Franchise Opportunities
dealership.description: Partner with Rockmix Infra's global network and expand high-precision construction machinery in your territory.

contact.title: Contact Our Corporate Office
contact.description: Reach out directly for customized plant requirements, commercial proposals, and wear-parts schedules.

cards.title: Corporate HQ & Manufacturing Works

forms.quoteSuccess: Your technical machinery proposal has been compiled instantly! Our commercial engineers will contact you with formal pricing details.
forms.callbackSuccess: Thank you! Our regional engineering head has received your call-back request and will reach out to you within 3 business hours.
forms.contactSuccess: Thank you for reaching out! Your message has been received by our administrative office, and we will follow up with you shortly.
forms.dealershipSuccess: Your dealership partnership application has been filed successfully. Our global network division will review your credentials.

products.name: Rockmix Mobile Concrete Batching Plant (RMP Series)
products.shortDesc: Highly versatile, portable, wheel-mounted batching plants for rapid on-site setup.
products.description: Our mobile concrete batching plants are built on a heavy-duty single chassis with integrated wheel-axles and a towing kingpin, allowing rapid relocation between remote highway, bridge, and infrastructure projects. Engineered for swift crane-free erection and maximum throughput with minimal civil preparation.
products.badgeColor: bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border-blue-200/50 dark:bg-blue-950/40 dark:text-blue-400 dark:border-blue-900/40
features: Production capacities available: 30, 45, and 60 m³/hr options
Integrated heavy-duty single-chassis wheel-mounted trailer with kingpin
Pre-wired, pre-piped, and factory-tested for plug-and-play field setup
Intuitive PLC control panel with SCADA interface and manual backup switches

specifications.label: Erection Time
specifications.value: Less than 24 hours under standard conditions

highlights: The ultimate mobile solution for linear road projects, canal systems, and short-term casting yards.

products.name: Rockmix Mini Mobile Concrete Batching Plant (RMP Series)
products.shortDesc: Ultra-compact trailer-mounted concrete plants designed for rural and space-restricted urban projects.
products.description: The Mini Mobile Concrete Batching Plant is engineered for agile, localized batching where space constraints prevent the use of standard heavy plants. Features a low aggregate feeding height for easy bucket loading, combined with high-precision digital load cells for consistent, reliable mixes.
products.badgeColor: bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border-blue-200/50 dark:bg-blue-950/40 dark:text-blue-400 dark:border-blue-900/40
features: Designed for tight, congested urban spaces and hard-to-reach rural regions
Optimized low aggregate feeding height for convenient loading via loader or manual labor
Fitted with durable reversible drum mixer or vertical pan mixer systems
Extremely quick setup with zero civil foundation work required on site

specifications.label: Mobility
specifications.value: Heavy-duty dual axles with pneumatic tires

specifications.label: Total Weight
specifications.value: Compact structure for easy local towing

specifications.label: Power Options
specifications.value: Electric motor or optional onboard diesel generator

highlights: Perfect for urban trenching, pipeline laying, telecom tower bases, and rural pathways.

products.name: Rockmix Wetmix Macadam Plant (RWMM Series)
products.shortDesc: Continuous-mixing aggregate plants for highway sub-base and base course layers.
products.description: Specifically engineered for high-volume laying of sub-base, base, and cement-stabilized mixture layers on expressways, runways, and container terminals. Provides highly uniform blending of multi-grade aggregates, binding agents, and water in a robust continuous double-shaft pugmill mixer.
products.badgeColor: bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border-blue-200/50 dark:bg-blue-950/40 dark:text-blue-400 dark:border-blue-900/40
features: Massive output capabilities ranging from 100 TPH to 250 TPH (Tons Per Hour)
Highly rigid dual-shaft pugmill with replaceable Hi-Chrome wear plates and alloy paddles
Four-compartment cold aggregate feeder bins with integrated variable speed drives (VFD)
Anti-segregation discharge surge hopper with hydraulic slide gates for direct truck loading

specifications.label: Feeder Bins
specifications.value: 4 bins with fine-adjustment aggregate discharge gates

specifications.label: Discharge Conveyor
specifications.value: Deep-groove Chevron belt for high aggregate volume

specifications.label: Screening Deck
specifications.value: Vibratory screen for rejecting oversized aggregates

highlights: Constant-rate automatic water spraying system synchronizes perfectly with material mass-flow rates.

products.name: Rockmix Compact Concrete Batching Plant (RCP Series)
products.shortDesc: Vertical skip-hoist batching plants with a highly optimized, small footprint.
products.description: Designed for space-restricted concrete manufacturing yards, commercial ready-mix plants, and precast factories in dense urban centers. Utilizes a high-speed vertical skip-hoist aggregate delivery system to eliminate long conveyor belts, delivering optimal layout efficiency.
products.badgeColor: bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border-blue-200/50 dark:bg-blue-950/40 dark:text-blue-400 dark:border-blue-900/40
features: Vertical skip-hoist bucket feed reduces total installation footprint by up to 45%
Equipped with durable, high-shear Twin Shaft mixers for complete homogeneity
Inline aggregate storage bins with independent load cells for simultaneous weighing
Modular pre-assembled sub-structures permit fast bolt-together site erection

specifications.label: Mixer Volume
specifications.value: 0.5 m³ to 1.0 m³ compacted output per batch

specifications.label: Maintenance Access
specifications.value: Galvanized walking platforms with complete safety railings

highlights: Maximizes real estate efficiency for precast block facilities and urban ready-mix hubs.

products.name: Rockmix Stationary Concrete Batching Plant (RSP Series)
products.shortDesc: Heavy-duty high-output batching plants built for continuous mega-infrastructure supply.
products.description: The powerhouse of the heavy construction sector, our Stationary Concrete Plants are custom-designed for sustained, high-output production on major dams, deep-sea bridges, metro systems, and commercial ready-mix centers. Built on massive structural steel frames with inline aggregate bunkers.
products.badgeColor: bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border-blue-200/50 dark:bg-blue-950/40 dark:text-blue-400 dark:border-blue-900/40
features: Continuous production capacities from 60 m³/hr up to 120 m³/hr
Large-volume inline storage bunkers with heavy-duty radial pneumatic gates
Advanced computerized SCADA control center with real-time material logging and reports
High-capacity dual-shaft mixer with automatic multi-nozzle high-pressure water washing

specifications.label: Mixer Batch Output
specifications.value: 1.5 m³ to 3.0 m³ compacted per cycle

specifications.label: Cement Weighing
specifications.value: Separate independent scale with pneumatic aeration

specifications.label: SCADA Software
specifications.value: Real-time production metrics with cloud reporting

highlights: Engineered to operate 24/7 under harsh conditions with zero aggregate bridging or cement hydration delays.

products.name: Rockmix Compact Mobility Concrete Batching Plant (RCMP Series)
products.shortDesc: Modular container-friendly concrete batching plants combining high capacity with global shipping ease.
products.description: A revolutionary hybrid design that matches the robust output of stationary plants while fitting entirely inside standard 40-foot shipping containers. Features quick-bolting structural legs and foldable aggregate storage hopper gates for ultra-fast relocation and minimal setup cost.
products.badgeColor: bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border-blue-200/50 dark:bg-blue-950/40 dark:text-blue-400 dark:border-blue-900/40
features: Modular sections optimize container packing, saving thousands in global transport costs
Pre-wired and pre-plumbed assembly with integrated socket plugs for swift commissioning
Equipped with advanced multi-zone twin-shaft high-shear mixers
Structural layout supports direct ground installation with basic level-compacting pads

specifications.label: Shipping Container
specifications.value: Fully fits inside 40ft High Cube containers

specifications.label: Installation Type
specifications.value: Quick-erect fold-out legs with bolt-on structures

specifications.label: Water Connection
specifications.value: Integrated pressurized pump block with digital flow meter

highlights: Designed for international contractors looking to shift operations globally with minimal logistic delays.

products.name: Stationary Concrete Pump
products.shortDesc: High-pressure stationary pumping systems for reliable horizontal and vertical concrete conveyance.
products.description: Engineered for conveying concrete mixtures over massive vertical heights or long horizontal distances. Ideal for high-rise buildings, railway tunnels, flyover foundations, and deep shafts. Built with high-stroke pumping cylinders and robust S-valve technology.
products.badgeColor: bg-blue-50 text-blue-700 border-blue-200/50 dark:bg-blue-950/40 dark:text-blue-400 dark:border-blue-900/40
features: Heavy-duty hydraulic circuits with smooth-acting S-valve transfer system
Dual power options: fuel-efficient turbocharged diesel or high-efficiency electric motors
Integrated auto-lubrication system for all critical seal rings and mixing arms
Wireless remote control unit for flexible, secure operator positioning

specifications.label: Maximum Aggregate
specifications.value: Handles aggregate sizes up to 40 mm

specifications.label: Hydraulic Pumps
specifications.value: Rexroth variable displacement axial piston pumps

highlights: High-pressure dual-wall cylinders and heavy-duty wear rings guarantee maximum service life during demanding vertical concrete climbs.
